notes: SHIP v1.14.214 — FIX: deploy scope-picker cab taps eaten (STAGE never enables) — the real B1 root cause + revert of the .212 regression. ROOT CAUSE (proven via live DevTools + elementFromPoint): .msc-actions is position:sticky;bottom:0, so it sticks to #pg-work's CONTENT-box bottom = viewport_bottom − padding_bottom. My v1.14.212 (adopting web-Claude .204) bumped #pg-work:has(.msc-actions) padding-bottom from ~71px to calc(var(--tabnav-h)+96px) (~180px), which raised the sticky stick-point ~110px UP into the MIDDLE of the cab list; the opaque z-index:5 bar then floated over the cab rows and intercepted their taps (elementFromPoint over the bar band returns DIV.msc-actions), so mscope_toggleCab never fired → selection count stuck at 0 → STAGE SCOPE SNAPSHOT stayed disabled → 'deployment won't work' on phone AND laptop. The transform:none rule .212 added on #wk-deploy was IRRELEVANT: transform establishes a containing block for position:FIXED, not position:STICKY — it did nothing for this bar and is now deleted. FIX: padding-bottom back to calc(var(--tabnav-h)+12px) so the sticky bar's content-box bottom sits just ABOVE the fixed #rd-botnav (not mid-list); .msc-foot-pad kept at 112px (>= bar height) as the scroll runway so the last cab clears the bar. VERIFIED LIVE (desktop Chrome automation, synthetic 20-30 cab master): with the reduced padding the bar drops to just above the nav and tapping a cab hits .msc-cab-id → row gains .sel → msc-confirm-btn.disabled flips false (STAGE enables). Body of JS (mscope_toggleCab/updateTally/confirm) was always correct — this was purely the sticky-bar overlay. INVESTIGATION NOTE: a separate 'page won't scroll' symptom seen in the automation browser was RULED OUT as an environment artifact — #pg-cmd (a page used fine daily) is equally unscrollable in that headless-ish 551px window, so it is NOT an app bug; real devices scroll normally. Legacy (?legacy=1) unaffected: rules are body.rd-scoped; legacy keeps the plain sticky rule byte-identical. CSS-only change; no markup/JS touched. Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline HTML blocks · CSS braces balanced · CRLF preserved · three-stamp lockstep .213->.214. ROLLBACK: git revert. SHIP-ORDER NOTE: batch-verify — this is a functional FIX ship; owner device pass requested. DEVICE-VERIFY: WORK → Deploy → NEW/SCOPE A JOB → with a Master loaded, tap cab rows → selection counter climbs and STAGE SCOPE SNAPSHOT enables; the action bar sits just above the bottom nav (not floating over the list); scroll the list and the last cab clears the bar. On phone AND laptop. ?legacy=1 unaffected.
